programme.title: Red Dawn (2012)
programme.desc: In this thrilling remake of the 1984 movie, Spokane, Washington, is suddenly invaded by North Korea. Now under enemy occupation, a group of teens form a ragtag resistance unit determined to reclaim their town from its captors! Chris Hemsworth stars.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Collision Course
programme.desc: Steve and Terri Irwin set out to save a crocodile, unaware that it’s swallowed a U.S. satellite beacon, and now they’re targets of the CIA! Crikey!

programme.title: Rollerball (1975)
programme.desc: James Caan stars as a rollerball champ in this fast-hitting, action-packed glimpse into a dystopian future in the year 2018 where a brutal, no-holds-barred sport takes the place of war, and murder is just a part of the game! John Houseman co-stars.

programme.title: Rollerball (2002)
programme.desc: Chris Klein, LL Cool J, and Rebecca Romijn-Stamos star in this high-octane thriller as the hottest team in the brutal sport Rollerball. When they discover the league's owner (Jean Reno) will do anything for ratings, they plan to take down the sport!

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: In the ravaged near-future, a brutal motorcycle gang rules the road, terrorizing innocent civilians. But they underestimate one cop: Max (Mel Gibson). When the bikers brutalize Max's family, they send him into a mad frenzy and a need for revenge!

programme.title: RoboCop
programme.desc: Classic sci-fi adventure about a cop...part man...part machine...the future of law enforcement.

programme.title: RoboCop 2
programme.desc: In this thrilling sequel, Robocop returns to fight his toughest opponent yet...his replacement!

programme.title: RoboCop 3
programme.desc: When a greedy corporation starts evicting families in favor of a very profitable real estate project, RoboCop (Robert John Burke) joins with a renegade band of freedom fighters to save them. But RoboCop must also face a new deadly android!

programme.title: RoboCop (2014)
programme.desc: In 2028 Detroit, when Alex Murphy (Joel Kinnaman) -- a loving husband, father and good cop -- is critically injured in the line of duty, the multinational conglomerate OmniCorp sees their chance for a part-man, part-robot police officer.

programme.title: Flesh + Blood
programme.desc: Betrayed by power. Bound by honor. In the battle between good and evil, only the strong survive! From visionary director Paul Verhoeven comes this epic adventure of medieval bravery and blood lust starring Rutger Hauer and Jennifer Jason Leigh.

programme.title: Rush
programme.desc: Two undercover officers spiral out of control, becoming lovers and addicts as they infiltrate a local drug scene to bring down a supplier.

programme.title: Running Scared
programme.desc: Billy Crystal and Gregory Hines have winning chemistry as two of the Windy City's finest (and wildest) cops, out to nail Chicago's toughest criminal in this comedy thriller that asks the question, "How come the bad guys always drive the good cars?"
